name: uuid-forge-mcp
description: MCP server for generating UUIDs (v4, v7), ULIDs, nanoids, and random IDs. Every project needs unique identifiers.

tools.name: generate_uuid_v4
tools.description: Generate one or more UUID v4 (random). Returns the most common ID format.

tools.name: generate_uuid_v7
tools.description: Generate UUID v7 (time-sortable, recommended for databases). Includes millisecond timestamp prefix.

tools.name: generate_nanoid
tools.description: Generate nanoid-style compact IDs. URL-safe, shorter than UUID.

tools.name: generate_ulid
tools.description: Generate ULID (Universally Unique Lexicographically Sortable Identifier). Great for distributed systems.

tools.name: parse_uuid
tools.description: Parse a UUID and extract version, variant, and timestamp (if v1/v7).
